sprint.goal: KE-5: Worktree governance binary resilience — fallback to main worktree on ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND (#1376)

senior.title: Fix worktree CLI binary crash — fall back to main worktree binary when local fails (#1376)
senior.note: KE-4 complete. PR #1374 merged (closes #1359). KE-5: modify scripts/claude-hook-wrapper.sh to validate binary with --version probe before using it; if local bin fails ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND, fall back to `git worktree list` main worktree binary. Main worktree binary always works (confirmed: /home/jared/agentguard-workspace/agent-guard/apps/cli/dist/bin.js v2.10.3). Fix must be silent — no new output on fallback, just governance continuity. Related: #1323, #1321 (pnpm interactive prompt hangs) may be separate follow-on.
